changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE variable_costs ( id serial, organization_id integer DEFAULT NULL, system_id integer DEFAULT NULL, cost_type_id integer DEFAULT NULL, equipment_cost double precision DEFAULT NULL, personnel_cost double precision DEFAULT NULL, percent_of_time double precision DEFAULT NULL, percent_of_budget double precision DEFAULT NULL, comments text DEFAULT NULL, CONSTRAINT pk_variable_costs PRIMARY KEY (id) , CONSTRAINT fk_variable_costs_to_organization FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organizations (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE , CONSTRAINT fk_variable_costs_to_system FOREIGN KEY (system_id) REFERENCES systems (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE , CONSTRAINT fk_variable_costs_to_cost_type FOREIGN KEY (cost_type_id) REFERENCES cost_types (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE ); CREATE INDEX i_variable_costs_organization_id ON variable_costs (organization_id); CREATE INDEX i_variable_costs_system_id ON variable_costs (system_id); CREATE INDEX i_variable_costs_cost_type_id ON variable_costs (cost_type_id);
